2605.13367.title: A Horn extension of DL-Lite with NL data complexity
2605.13367.paper_summary: The literature on ontology-mediated query answering (OMQA) has been shaped by two key results: first-order rewritability for DL-Lite, and PTime-hardness of data complexity for essentially every description logic beyond it. This has effectively positioned DL-Lite as the only practical choice for query rewriting, restricting OMQA solutions to first-order queries and ontologies that can be rewritten into them. This AC0 vs. PTime dichotomy is especially limiting if we consider that OMQA targets graph-structured data, and that standard graph query languages (including the recent ISO standards GQL and SQL/PGQ) are typically NL-complete. Towards identifying a rich Horn DL that can be rewritten into graph query languages and that can still express many ELI and DL-Lite ontologies, we introduce a stratification mechanism for ELI that controls the interaction between conjunction and recursion. In this way, we obtain ELbotpreceq, a description logic that strictly extends the core DL-Lite, supports reachability axioms and restricted conjunction, and allows for reasoning in NL. We establish the NL upper bound via a rewriting into nested two-way regular path queries, a fragment of GQL, providing initial evidence that our ontology language is a promising candidate for extending OMQA to graph query languages.
2605.13367.paper_summary_zh: 文獻中關於本體媒介查詢回答（OMQA）的研究受到了兩個關鍵結果的影響：DL-Lite 的一階重寫性，以及對於幾乎所有超越它的描述邏輯的數據複雜度的 PTime-困難性。這有效地將 DL-Lite 定位為查詢重寫的唯一實用選擇，限制了 OMQA 解決方案僅能針對一階查詢和可以重寫成它們的本體。這種 AC0 與 PTime 的二分法特別限制了我們的考量，因為 OMQA 針對的是圖結構數據，而標準圖查詢語言（包括最近的 ISO 標準 GQL 和 SQL/PGQ）通常是 NL 完全的。為了識別一個豐富的 Horn DL，該 DL 可以重寫成圖查詢語言並且仍然能夠表達許多 ELI 和 DL-Lite 本體，我們引入了一種 ELI 的分層機制，以控制合取和遞歸之間的互動。這樣，我們獲得了 ELbotpreceq，一種嚴格擴展核心 DL-Lite 的描述邏輯，支持可達性公理和限制合取，並允許在 NL 中進行推理。我們通過重寫成嵌套的雙向正規路徑查詢（GQL 的一個片段）來確立 NL 的上界，提供了初步證據，表明我們的本體語言是擴展 OMQA 至圖查詢語言的有前景候選者。
2605.13367.author: Janos Arpasi et.al.
2605.13367.authors: Janos Arpasi, Bartosz Jan Bednarczyk, Magdalena Ortiz
